revision.text: <templatestyles src="Kbd/styles.css"></templatestyles><kbd class="{{{class|}}} mw-tmpl-kbd" {{#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"}} style="{{#if:{{{spacing|}}}| padding-left:{{{padding|0.2em}}}; padding-right:{{{padding|0.2em}}};| letter-spacing:0.05em; padding-left:0.25em; padding-right:0.2em;}}{{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}}}" {{#if:{{{lang|}}}|lang="{{{lang}}}"}} {{#if:{{{title|}}}|title="{{{title}}}"}}>{{{1|user input}}}</kbd><noinclude> <!--Categories go near the bottom of the /doc page.--> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

<templatestyles src="Kbd/styles.css"></templatestyles><kbd class="{{{class|}}} mw-tmpl-kbd" {{#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"}} style="{{#if:{{{spacing|}}}| padding-left:{{{padding|0.2em}}}; padding-right:{{{padding|0.2em}}};| letter-spacing:0.05em; padding-left:0.25em; padding-right:0.2em;}}{{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}}}" {{#if:{{{lang|}}}|lang="{{{lang}}}"}} {{#if:{{{title|}}}|title="{{{title}}}"}}>{{{1|user input}}}</kbd><noinclude> <!--Categories go near the bottom of the /doc page.--> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <templatestyles src="Kbd/styles.css"></templatestyles><kbd class="{{{class|}}} mw-tmpl-kbd" {{#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"}} style="{{#if:{{{spacing|}}}| padding-left:{{{padding|0.2em}}}; padding-right:{{{padding|0.2em}}};| letter-spacing:0.05em; padding-left:0.25em; padding-right:0.2em;}}{{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}}}" {{#if:{{{lang|}}}|lang="{{{lang}}}"}} {{#if:{{{title|}}}|title="{{{title}}}"}}>{{{1|user input}}}</kbd><noinclude> <!--Categories go near the bottom of the /doc page.--> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <templatestyles src="Kbd/styles.css"></templatestyles><kbd class="{{{class|}}} mw-tmpl-kbd" {{#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"}} style="{{#if:{{{spacing|}}}| padding-left:{{{padding|0.2em}}}; padding-right:{{{padding|0.2em}}};| letter-spacing:0.05em; padding-left:0.25em; padding-right:0.2em;}}{{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}}}" {{#if:{{{lang|}}}|lang="{{{lang}}}"}} {{#if:{{{title|}}}|title="{{{title}}}"}}>{{{1|user input}}}</kbd><noinclude> <!--Categories go near the bottom of the /doc page.--> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <templatestyles src="Kbd/styles.css"></templatestyles><kbd class="{{{class|}}} mw-tmpl-kbd" {{#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"}} style="{{#if:{{{spacing|}}}| padding-left:{{{padding|0.2em}}}; padding-right:{{{padding|0.2em}}};| letter-spacing:0.05em; padding-left:0.25em; padding-right:0.2em;}}{{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}}}" {{#if:{{{lang|}}}|lang="{{{lang}}}"}} {{#if:{{{title|}}}|title="{{{title}}}"}}>{{{1|user input}}}</kbd><noinclude> <!--Categories go near the bottom of the /doc page.--> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting this template since it seems broken in how it treats unknown parameters in [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<templatestyles src="Kbd/styles.css"></templatestyles><kbd class="{{{class|}}} mw-tmpl-kbd" {{#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"}} style="{{#if:{{{spacing|}}}| padding-left:{{{padding|0.2em}}}; padding-right:{{{padding|0.2em}}};| letter-spacing:0.05em; padding-left:0.25em; padding-right:0.2em;}}{{#if:{{{style|}}}|{{{style}}}}}" {{#if:{{{lang|}}}|lang="{{{lang}}}"}} {{#if:{{{title|}}}|title="{{{title}}}"}}>{{{1|user input}}}</kbd><noinclude>

{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
